menu_items.name: Mapo Tofu
menu_items.description: Silken tofu in a spicy chili and black bean sauce with ground pork.

menu_items.name: Tofu with Mixed Vegetables
menu_items.description: Pan-fried tofu stir-fried with a variety of fresh vegetables in light sauce.

menu_items.name: Sesame Tofu
menu_items.description: Crispy tofu in a sweet sesame sauce topped with toasted sesame seeds.

menu_items.name: Tofu in Garlic Sauce
menu_items.description: Tender tofu with vegetables in a fragrant spicy garlic sauce.
